news.title: Metropolis expects to achieve the higher end of 13-15% revenue growth guidance.
news.summary: Metropolis expects to achieve the higher end of 13-15% revenue growth guidance.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare targets 13-15% FY26 revenue growth, driven by preventive and specialty diagnostics.
TruHealth and specialty diagnostics saw strong Q3FY26 growth, contributing ~40% of total revenue.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare targets 13-15% FY26 revenue growth, driven by preventive and specialty diagnostics.
TruHealth and specialty diagnostics saw strong Q3FY26 growth, contributing ~40% of total revenue.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare approves bonus equity shares issuance at 3:1 ratio.
The move aims to enhance shareholder value and improve market liquidity.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare approves bonus equity shares issuance at 3:1 ratio.
The move aims to enhance shareholder value and improve market liquidity.

news.title:
Metropolis Health's Q3 net profit rose 31.8% to ₹41.4 crore with revenue up 25.8% to ₹405.9 crore.
EBITDA increased 31.5% to ₹95.2 crore, maintaining a stable margin of 22.4% YoY.
news.summary:
Metropolis Health's Q3 net profit rose 31.8% to ₹41.4 crore with revenue up 25.8% to ₹405.9 crore.
EBITDA increased 31.5% to ₹95.2 crore, maintaining a stable margin of 22.4% YoY.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare approved unaudited Q3 financials and a 3:1 bonus share issue.
Sold External Quality Assessment business for up to ₹1.25 cr; included tax and labour code impacts.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare approved unaudited Q3 financials and a 3:1 bonus share issue.
Sold External Quality Assessment business for up to ₹1.25 cr; included tax and labour code impacts.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare's board will meet on Feb 4, 2026, to review Q3 FY2025 results.
The board will also consider issuing bonus shares, subject to shareholder approval.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare's board will meet on Feb 4, 2026, to review Q3 FY2025 results.
The board will also consider issuing bonus shares, subject to shareholder approval.

news.title:
Pharma firms expect 8-11% revenue growth in Q3FY26 driven by strong domestic sales.
Generic Revlimid sales decline in the US; PAT growth forecasted at 2-4% for the quarter.
news.summary:
Pharma firms expect 8-11% revenue growth in Q3FY26 driven by strong domestic sales.
Generic Revlimid sales decline in the US; PAT growth forecasted at 2-4% for the quarter.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare launches Genomics Center to enhance precision diagnostics in India.
The initiative uses Illumina's NovaSeq X Series for advanced genomic research and insights.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare launches Genomics Center to enhance precision diagnostics in India.
The initiative uses Illumina's NovaSeq X Series for advanced genomic research and insights.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare reported 26% YoY consolidated revenue growth in Q3FY26.
B2B revenues rose 37%, B2C 18% YoY, with EBITDA margins improving despite challenges.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare reported 26% YoY consolidated revenue growth in Q3FY26.
B2B revenues rose 37%, B2C 18% YoY, with EBITDA margins improving despite challenges.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare Ltd secures Indian patent for a TB decision-management system.
The system integrates microbiology, diagnostics, radiology, and risk factors for TB detection and management.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare Ltd secures Indian patent for a TB decision-management system.
The system integrates microbiology, diagnostics, radiology, and risk factors for TB detection and management.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare announces Analyst/Investor meet on Nov 27, 2025.
Interaction at JP Morgan Virtual Forum; no UPSI to be discussed.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare announces Analyst/Investor meet on Nov 27, 2025.
Interaction at JP Morgan Virtual Forum; no UPSI to be discussed.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare's revenue grew 23% YoY; organic growth at 12%. EBITDA margin improved to 26.8%.
PAT rose 13.6%; strategic focus on automation, digital tools, specialty testing, and acquisition integration.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare's revenue grew 23% YoY; organic growth at 12%. EBITDA margin improved to 26.8%.
PAT rose 13.6%; strategic focus on automation, digital tools, specialty testing, and acquisition integration.

news.title:
Last day to buy shares of Garden Reach, Nuvama, Metropolis, Chambal Fertilisers, Saregama, Siyaram, and Astral for dividend eligibility is Nov. 10.
Dividends announced: Garden Reach Rs 5.75, Nuvama Rs 70, Metropolis Rs 4, Chambal Rs 5, Saregama Rs 4.50, Siyaram Rs 4, Astral Rs 1.50 per share.
news.summary:
Last day to buy shares of Garden Reach, Nuvama, Metropolis, Chambal Fertilisers, Saregama, Siyaram, and Astral for dividend eligibility is Nov. 10.
Dividends announced: Garden Reach Rs 5.75, Nuvama Rs 70, Metropolis Rs 4, Chambal Rs 5, Saregama Rs 4.50, Siyaram Rs 4, Astral Rs 1.50 per share.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare missed EPS estimates by 6.4%; analysts maintain revenue forecasts at 16.5b for 2026.
EPS forecast reduced to 38.07, yet price target stays steady at 2,167; growth expected to outpace industry averages.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare missed EPS estimates by 6.4%; analysts maintain revenue forecasts at 16.5b for 2026.
EPS forecast reduced to 38.07, yet price target stays steady at 2,167; growth expected to outpace industry averages.

news.title:
HDFC Securities rates LIC, Aurobindo Pharma, Star Cement, Metropolis, Godrej Properties, Birlasoft as 'Add'; Symphony, Astral as 'Buy'.
LIC's APE growth at 3% YoY; Mankind Pharma's Ebitda down 6% vs. estimates; Aurobindo Pharma's Ebitda up 7% YoY.
news.summary:
HDFC Securities rates LIC, Aurobindo Pharma, Star Cement, Metropolis, Godrej Properties, Birlasoft as 'Add'; Symphony, Astral as 'Buy'.
LIC's APE growth at 3% YoY; Mankind Pharma's Ebitda down 6% vs. estimates; Aurobindo Pharma's Ebitda up 7% YoY.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare released audio recording of Q2 FY26 earnings call held on Nov 6, 2025.
The financial results discussion recording is available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare released audio recording of Q2 FY26 earnings call held on Nov 6, 2025.
The financial results discussion recording is available on the company's website.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare acquired Core Diagnostics for Rs 247 cr in 2024, targeting double-digit margins by FY26-end.
Q2FY26 results: Revenue up 22.7% YoY to Rs 429 cr, EBITDA up 20.4% at Rs 108 cr, Net Profit rose 13.2% YoY to Rs 52.7 cr.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare acquired Core Diagnostics for Rs 247 cr in 2024, targeting double-digit margins by FY26-end.
Q2FY26 results: Revenue up 22.7% YoY to Rs 429 cr, EBITDA up 20.4% at Rs 108 cr, Net Profit rose 13.2% YoY to Rs 52.7 cr.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare projects 10-11% volume growth for FY, showing strong performance.
Company remains confident in demand for healthcare services, per concall updates.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare projects 10-11% volume growth for FY, showing strong performance.
Company remains confident in demand for healthcare services, per concall updates.

news.title: Metropolis sets organic growth target of 70-100 bps for FY26.
news.summary: Metropolis sets organic growth target of 70-100 bps for FY26.

news.title:
Metropolis Healthcare targets double-digit growth through preventive health, specialty testing, and acquisitions.
Reported 19% YoY EBITDA growth, ₹4/share dividend, expanding in India and Africa.
news.summary:
Metropolis Healthcare targets double-digit growth through preventive health, specialty testing, and acquisitions.
Reported 19% YoY EBITDA growth, ₹4/share dividend, expanding in India and Africa.
